kpis.title: Response Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("redis/total_commands_processed", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Read Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("redis/total_reads_processed", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Write Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("redis/total_writes_processed", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Network Input Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("redis/total_net_input_bytes", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Network Output Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("redis/total_net_output_bytes", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t
